name: SQLite Document Store
description: Buffered document storage for OpenClaw using SQLite, FTS5, chunking, optional OpenAI-compatible embeddings, and future sqlite-vec support.

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file.

defaultChunkTargetTokens.description: Default target chunk size in approximate tokens.

defaultChunkOverlapTokens.description: Default overlap between adjacent chunks in approximate tokens.

enableFts.description: Enable SQLite FTS5 indexes for keyword search.

vectorMode.description: Vector search mode. sqlite-vec support is scaffolded but not enabled by default yet.

sqliteVecExtensionPath.description: Optional path to the sqlite-vec extension shared library.

embedding.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible embeddings provider used to generate chunk embeddings during save/backfill.

enabled.description: Enable chunk embedding generation. When false, documents are stored without calling the embeddings API.

apiKey.description: Bearer token for the OpenAI-compatible embeddings API.

model.description: Embedding model name sent to the upstream API.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for embedding requests in milliseconds.

batchSize.description: Number of chunk texts batched into one embeddings request.

dimensions.description: Optional embedding dimensionality, for providers/models that support overriding dimensions.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: SQLite file used as the buffered document store.

embedding.label: Embeddings Provider
embedding.help: OpenAI-compatible endpoint used to generate chunk embeddings.
